title: goniophlebium fraternum
intro: Goniophlebium fraternum is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the Fraternal Goniophlebium. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Goniophlebium fraternum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Goniophlebium fraternum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
